creator: slw@quake.convey.ru
text:
fsck of partition 'f' disk ad1 caused kernel panic.
	fsck of this partition on 4.1-R system success and no problem.

** /dev/ad1f
** Last Mounted on /mnt/usr
** Phase 1 - Check Blocks and Sizes
kernel trap 9 with interrupts disabled


Fatal trap 9: general protection fault while in kernel mode
instruction pointer     = 0x8:0xc022e94a
stack pointer           = 0x10:0xc9e05f4c
frame pointer           = 0x10:0xc9e05f60
code segment            = base 0x0, limit 0xfffff, type 0x1b
                        = DPL 0, pres 1, def32 1, gran 1
processor eflags        = resume, IOPL = 0
current process         = 16 (irq14: ata0)
trap number             = 9
panic: general protection fault

How-To-Repeat: 	fsck /dev/ad1f

	My be depended on contents of /dev/ad1f
